General.Name: Mobile Global Esports Inc.
General.Description: Mobile Global Esports Inc., gaming and digital entertainment company, operates in the esports business. It organizes and commercializes various virtual esports events. The company engages in developing Dominus, a proprietary fantasy simulation and scoring engine. The company was formerly known as Elite Esports, Inc. and changed its name to Mobile Global Esports Inc. in April 2021. Mobile Global Esports Inc. was founded in 2016 and is based in Westport, Connecticut.
General.Address: 500 Post Road East, Westport, CT, United States, 06880
